definition: 自信地宣称自己是正确的/很懂某事，相当于
origin: 源自篮球俚语，"knowing ball"原本指精通篮球，后来被TikTok发扬光大，成为万能的自信宣言

dialogue.context: 朋友在争论哪家餐厅好吃

lines.speaker: Alex
lines.text: Trust me, that new ramen place is amazing. I know ball.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Okay okay, you clearly know your food. I'll try it!

examples: That bag? It's the next It-girl moment. I know ball.
The pastrami donut at that place? Life-changing. I know ball.
This playlist? Absolutely fire. I know ball.
When I walk into Sephora bare-faced and they think I don't know ball... *proceeds to do a full beat* Baby, I know ball.
cultural_notes: 这个短语在TikTok上非常流行，通常配合"plug walk remix"背景音乐使用，形成固定的视频格式：先展示被低估的场景，然后展示实力证明，最后加上"I know ball"字幕。
